title: Miami Seh New York
overview: About MIAMI SEH NEW YORK - A coming of age film where the fun filled ride of four messed up girls, from Miami to New York, turns into a lesson of their lives, transforming each one of them. The adventure trip takes a fleeting slip into the moments of heartbreak, but then comes back to the tone it took off, seamlessly evolving all our key characters.
